zsh.c(3) Library Functions Manual zsh.c(3)

NAME

zsh.c - Zsh shell completion script generator with category grouping.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


asciichat_error_t completions_generate_zsh (FILE *output)

Detailed Description

Zsh shell completion script generator with category grouping.

Definition in file zsh.c.

Function Documentation

asciichat_error_t completions_generate_zsh (FILE * output)

Definition at line 166 of file zsh.c.

166                                                          {
167   if (!output) {
168     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Output stream cannot be NULL");
169   }
170 
171   fprintf(output, "#compdef _ascii_chat ascii-chat\n"
172                   "# Zsh completion script for ascii-chat\n"
173                   "# Generated from options registry - DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY\n"
174                   "\n"
175                   "_ascii_chat() {\n"
176                   "  if [[ \"${words[2]}\" == -* ]]; then\n"
177                   "    _ascii_chat_discovery\n"
178                   "    return 0\n"
179                   "  fi\n"
180                   "  local curcontext=\"$curcontext\" state line modes\n"
181                   "  _arguments -s \\\n"
182                   "    '1: :->mode' \\\n"
183                   "    '(*):args:_ascii_chat_args' && return\n"
184                   "  [[ -n \"$state\" ]] || return 1\n"
185                   "  case $state in\n"
186                   "    mode)\n"
187                   "      local -a server_modes client_modes\n"
188                   "      server_modes=(\n");
189 
190   /* Generate server-like modes from registry */
191   size_t mode_server_count = 0;
192   const mode_descriptor_t *mode_server_descs = get_modes_by_group("server-like", &mode_server_count);
193   if (mode_server_descs) {
194     for (size_t i = 0; i < mode_server_count; i++) {
195       fprintf(output, "        '%s:%s'\n", mode_server_descs[i].name, mode_server_descs[i].description);
196     }
197     SAFE_FREE(mode_server_descs);
198   }
199 
200   fprintf(output, "      )\n"
201                   "      client_modes=(\n");
202 
203   /* Generate client-like modes from registry (exclude discovery since it's the default mode) */
204   size_t mode_client_count = 0;
205   const mode_descriptor_t *mode_client_descs = get_modes_by_group("client-like", &mode_client_count);
206   if (mode_client_descs) {
207     for (size_t i = 0; i < mode_client_count; i++) {
208       /* Skip discovery mode - it's the default when no mode is specified */
209       if (strcmp(mode_client_descs[i].name, "discovery") == 0) {
210         continue;
211       }
212       fprintf(output, "        '%s:%s'\n", mode_client_descs[i].name, mode_client_descs[i].description);
213     }
214     SAFE_FREE(mode_client_descs);
215   }
216 
217   fprintf(output, "      )\n"
218                   "      _describe -t server-modes 'server-like modes' server_modes\n"
219                   "      _describe -t client-modes 'client-like modes' client_modes\n"
220                   "      ;;\n"
221                   "  esac\n"
222                   "}\n"
223                   "\n"
224                   "_ascii_chat_args() {\n"
225                   "  case $words[2] in\n"
226                   "    server)\n"
227                   "      _ascii_chat_server\n"
228                   "      ;;\n"
229                   "    discovery-service)\n"
230                   "      _ascii_chat_discovery_service\n"
231                   "      ;;\n"
232                   "    client)\n"
233                   "      _ascii_chat_client\n"
234                   "      ;;\n"
235                   "    mirror)\n"
236                   "      _ascii_chat_mirror\n"
237                   "      ;;\n"
238                   "    discovery)\n"
239                   "      _ascii_chat_discovery\n"
240                   "      ;;\n"
241                   "    *)\n"
242                   "      _ascii_chat_discovery\n"
243                   "      ;;\n"
244                   "  esac\n"
245                   "}\n"
246                   "\n"
247                   "# Server-like modes: handle incoming connections and stream management\n"
248                   "_ascii_chat_server() {\n");
249 
250   /* Server options - grouped by category */
251   size_t server_count = 0;
252   const option_descriptor_t *server_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_SERVER, false, &server_count);
253 
254   if (server_opts) {
255     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, server_opts, server_count, "server");
256     SAFE_FREE(server_opts);
257   }
258 
259   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
260                   "}\n"
261                   "\n"
262                   "_ascii_chat_discovery_service() {\n");
263 
264   /* Discovery-service options - grouped by category */
265   size_t discovery_svc_count = 0;
266   const option_descriptor_t *discovery_svc_opts =
267       options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_DISCOVERY_SERVICE, false, &discovery_svc_count);
268 
269   if (discovery_svc_opts) {
270     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, discovery_svc_opts, discovery_svc_count, "discovery_service");
271     SAFE_FREE(discovery_svc_opts);
272   }
273 
274   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
275                   "}\n"
276                   "\n"
277                   "# Client-like modes: connect to servers or render local media\n"
278                   "_ascii_chat_client() {\n");
279 
280   /* Client options - grouped by category */
281   size_t client_count = 0;
282   const option_descriptor_t *client_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_CLIENT, false, &client_count);
283 
284   if (client_opts) {
285     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, client_opts, client_count, "client");
286     SAFE_FREE(client_opts);
287   }
288 
289   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
290                   "}\n"
291                   "\n"
292                   "_ascii_chat_mirror() {\n");
293 
294   /* Mirror options - grouped by category */
295   size_t mirror_count = 0;
296   const option_descriptor_t *mirror_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_MIRROR, false, &mirror_count);
297 
298   if (mirror_opts) {
299     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, mirror_opts, mirror_count, "mirror");
300     SAFE_FREE(mirror_opts);
301   }
302 
303   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
304                   "}\n"
305                   "\n"
306                   "# Discovery mode: find sessions via discovery service (default mode when no mode specified)\n"
307                   "_ascii_chat_discovery() {\n");
308 
309   /* For discovery mode, get all options (binary + mode-specific) in a single call */
310   size_t discovery_count = 0;
311   const option_descriptor_t *discovery_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_DISCOVERY, true, &discovery_count);
312 
313   if (discovery_opts) {
314     zsh_write_options_grouped(output, discovery_opts, discovery_count, "discovery");
315     SAFE_FREE(discovery_opts);
316   }
317 
318   // Return after all option sets are described (prevents zsh fallback completion)
319   fprintf(output, "  return\n"
320                   "}\n"
321                   "\n"
322                   "_ascii_chat \"$@\"\n");
323 
324   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
325 }




References get_modes_by_group(),
    options_registry_get_for_display(), SAFE_FREE, and
    SET_ERRNO.


Referenced by completions_generate_for_shell().








Author


Zachary Fogg <me@zfo.gg>







  

    Version 0.9.0
    ascii-chat
